```{r}
#| label: day04-setup
#| include: false
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidymodels)
  library(palmerpenguins)
  library(dplyr)
  library(tidyr)
  library(ggplot2)
  library(rlang)
  library(vip)
  library(purrr)
  library(themis)
})
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  out.width = "100%",
  dpi = 120
)

peng_cls <- palmerpenguins::penguins |>
  filter(species %in% c("Adelie", "Gentoo")) |>
  mutate(
    y = factor(species, levels = c("Adelie", "Gentoo")),
    year = as.numeric(year)
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(-species, -flipper_length_mm, -body_mass_g) |>
  tidyr::drop_na()

folds <- vfold_cv(peng_cls, v = 5, strata = y)
metrics_acc <- metric_set(accuracy)

peng_bal <- peng_cls

rec_base <- recipe(y ~ ., data = peng_bal) |>
  step_zv(all_predictors()) |>
  step_dummy(all_nominal_predictors()) |>
  step_normalize(all_numeric_predictors())

tree_spec <- decision_tree(tree_depth = 4, min_n = 10) |>
  set_engine("rpart") |>
  set_mode("classification")

wf_tree <- workflow() |>
  add_recipe(rec_base) |>
  add_model(tree_spec)

set.seed(6)
rs_tree <- fit_resamples(wf_tree, folds, metrics = metrics_acc)

# Teaching scenarios (artificial problems — document real prevalence on the data card)
set.seed(4)
peng_imb <- peng_bal |>
  group_by(y) |>
  filter(y == "Adelie" | (y == "Gentoo" & dplyr::row_number() <= 10L)) |>
  ungroup()

peng_imb3 <- prep_penguins_multiclass_imbalance(
  minority_class = "Chinstrap",
  hard_to_class = "Adelie",
  n_minority = 15L
)

peng_na <- peng_bal
bill_length_true <- peng_na$bill_length_mm
set.seed(4)
na_bill <- sample(which(!is.na(peng_na$bill_length_mm)), size = 22L)
peng_na$bill_length_mm[na_bill] <- NA
na_sex <- sample(which(!is.na(peng_na$sex)), size = 5L)
peng_na$sex[na_sex] <- NA

peng_pca <- palmerpenguins::penguins |>
  filter(species %in% c("Adelie", "Gentoo")) |>
  mutate(
    y = factor(species, levels = c("Adelie", "Gentoo")),
    year = as.numeric(year)
  ) |>
  dplyr::select(-species) |>
  tidyr::drop_na()

folds_imb <- vfold_cv(peng_imb, v = 5, strata = y)
folds_imb3 <- vfold_cv(peng_imb3, v = 5, strata = y3)
folds_pca <- vfold_cv(peng_pca, v = 5, strata = y)
sens_gentoo <- yardstick::metric_tweak("sens", sens, event_level = "second")
spec_gentoo <- yardstick::metric_tweak("spec", spec, event_level = "second")
roc_auc_gentoo <- yardstick::metric_tweak("roc_auc", roc_auc, event_level = "second")
pr_auc_gentoo <- yardstick::metric_tweak("pr_auc", pr_auc, event_level = "second")
metrics_cls_imb <- metric_set(
  accuracy,
  sens_gentoo,
  spec_gentoo,
  roc_auc_gentoo,
  pr_auc_gentoo
)

recall_macro <- yardstick::metric_tweak("recall_macro", sens, estimator = "macro")
f_meas_macro <- yardstick::metric_tweak("f_meas_macro", f_meas, estimator = "macro")
metrics_cls_imb3 <- metric_set(
  accuracy,
  recall_macro,
  f_meas_macro
)

plot_class_balance <- function(df, title = "Class counts") {
  ggplot(df, aes(y, fill = y)) +
    geom_bar(show.legend = FALSE) +
    geom_text(stat = "count", aes(label = after_stat(count)), vjust = -0.3, size = 4) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c(Adelie = "turquoise", Gentoo = "magenta")) +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = title, x = "Species (y)", y = "n")
}

plot_na_highlight <- function(df, xvar, yvar, title = NULL, margin_frac = 0.16) {
  x_obs <- df[[xvar]]
  x_rng <- range(x_obs, na.rm = TRUE)
  x_pad <- diff(x_rng) * margin_frac
  x_stub <- x_rng[1] - x_pad

  df <- df |>
    mutate(
      missing_x = is.na(.data[[xvar]]),
      x_plot = ifelse(missing_x, x_stub, .data[[xvar]])
    )
  miss <- dplyr::filter(df, missing_x)
  ok <- dplyr::filter(df, !missing_x)

  ggplot(df, aes(x = x_plot, y = .data[[yvar]])) +
    annotate(
      "rect",
      xmin = x_stub - x_pad * 0.55,
      xmax = x_rng[1] - x_pad * 0.05,
      ymin = -Inf,
      ymax = Inf,
      fill = "#FFEBEE",
      alpha = 0.45
    ) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = x_rng[1], linetype = "dotted", color = "gray55") +
    geom_point(
      data = ok,
      aes(color = y),
      size = 2.8,
      alpha = 0.85
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = miss,
      aes(x = x_plot, y = .data[[yvar]]),
      shape = 1,
      color = "#B71C1C",
      size = 12,
      stroke = 2.2,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_point(
      data = miss,
      aes(x = x_plot, y = .data[[yvar]]),
      shape = 4,
      color = "#B71C1C",
      size = 5.5,
      stroke = 2.2,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    scale_x_continuous(
      limits = c(x_stub - x_pad * 0.5, x_rng[2] + x_pad * 0.1),
      expand = expansion(mult = c(0.02, 0.02))
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(Adelie = "black", Gentoo = "gray40"), name = "Species") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    labs(
      title = title,
      x = xvar,
      y = yvar,
      caption = "Pink band: bill length unknown (NA). Red × markers are NOT placed at the eventual imputed value."
    )
}

plot_imputed_highlight <- function(
    raw,
    filled,
    xvar,
    yvar,
    title = NULL,
    true_xvar = NULL,
    margin_frac = 0.16
) {
  stopifnot(nrow(raw) == nrow(filled))

  was_missing <- is.na(raw[[xvar]])
  idx <- which(was_missing)
  has_true <- !is.null(true_xvar) && true_xvar %in% names(raw)

  ok_df <- data.frame(
    x = filled[[xvar]][!was_missing],
    y = raw[[yvar]][!was_missing],
    species = raw$y[!was_missing],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  imp_df <- data.frame(
    x_imputed = filled[[xvar]][idx],
    y = raw[[yvar]][idx],
    species = raw$y[idx],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  if (has_true) {
    imp_df$x_true <- raw[[true_xvar]][idx]
  }

  p <- ggplot2::ggplot() +
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      data = ok_df,
      ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y),
      color = "gray80",
      size = 2.4,
      alpha = 0.7
    )

  if (has_true) {
    p <- p +
      ggplot2::geom_segment(
        data = imp_df,
        ggplot2::aes(x = x_true, xend = x_imputed, y = y, yend = y),
        color = "#E65100",
        linewidth = 0.9,
        linetype = "dashed",
        arrow = grid::arrow(length = grid::unit(0.12, "inches"), type = "closed")
      ) +
      ggplot2::geom_point(
        data = imp_df,
        ggplot2::aes(x = x_true, y = y),
        shape = 1,
        color = "#37474F",
        size = 4.5,
        stroke = 1.4
      )
  }

  p +
    ggplot2::geom_point(
      data = imp_df,
      ggplot2::aes(x = x_imputed, y = y),
      shape = 21,
      fill = "#FFC107",
      color = "#B71C1C",
      size = 5.5,
      stroke = 2
    ) +
    ggplot2::scale_x_continuous(expand = ggplot2::expansion(mult = c(0.06, 0.04))) +
    ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      title = title,
      x = xvar,
      y = yvar,
      caption = if (has_true) {
        paste(
          "Open circles: true bill length (simulation only).",
          "Gold: median-imputed value for that same penguin.",
          "Gray background: birds with observed bill length."
        )
      } else {
        "Gold: median-imputed bill length for penguins that were missing on input."
      }
    )
}

metrics_summary_table <- function(fit_res, label) {
  collect_metrics(fit_res) |>
    dplyr::filter(.metric %in% c("accuracy", "sens_gentoo", "spec_gentoo", "roc_auc_gentoo", "pr_auc_gentoo")) |>
    dplyr::mutate(
      .metric = dplyr::recode(
        .metric,
        sens_gentoo = "sens (Gentoo+)",
        spec_gentoo = "spec (Gentoo+)"
      )
    ) |>
    dplyr::select(.metric, mean, std_err) |>
    dplyr::mutate(model = label) |>
    dplyr::relocate(model)
}

compare_metrics_tbl <- function(...) {
  tab <- purrr::imap_dfr(rlang::list2(...), ~ metrics_summary_table(.x, .y)) |>
    dplyr::select(model, .metric, mean, std_err) |>
    dplyr::mutate(cell = sprintf("%.3f (%.3f)", mean, std_err)) |>
    dplyr::select(model, .metric, cell) |>
    tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = model, values_from = cell)
  knitr::kable(tab, caption = "Cross-validated metrics: mean (std err)")
}

plot_prob_boundary <- function(
    model,
    data,
    f1 = "bill_length_mm",
    f2 = "bill_depth_mm",
    title = NULL
) {
  r1 <- range(data[[f1]], na.rm = TRUE)
  r2 <- range(data[[f2]], na.rm = TRUE)
  grid <- expand.grid(
    seq(r1[1] - 0.5, r1[2] + 0.5, length.out = 120),
    seq(r2[1] - 0.5, r2[2] + 0.5, length.out = 120)
  )
  names(grid) <- c(f1, f2)
  for (nm in setdiff(names(data), c(f1, f2, "y"))) {
    v <- data[[nm]]
    grid[[nm]] <- if (is.numeric(v)) stats::median(v, na.rm = TRUE) else {
      tab <- table(v)
      names(tab)[which.max(tab)]
    }
  }
  grid$prob <- predict(model, new_data = grid, type = "prob")$.pred_Gentoo
  ggplot(data, aes(!!sym(f1), !!sym(f2))) +
    geom_raster(
      data = grid,
      aes(!!sym(f1), !!sym(f2), fill = prob),
      interpolate = TRUE,
      inherit.aes = FALSE
    ) +
    geom_point(aes(color = y), size = 2.2) +
    scale_fill_gradient(low = "turquoise", high = "magenta", name = "P(Gentoo)") +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(Adelie = "black", Gentoo = "white"), name = "Species") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(title = title, x = f1, y = f2)
}

save_day04_composite <- function(model, data, title, chunk_id, f1 = "bill_length_mm", f2 = "bill_depth_mm") {
  path <- paste0(knitr::fig_chunk(chunk_id), ".png")
  dir.create(dirname(path), recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  if (requireNamespace("ragg", quietly = TRUE)) {
    ragg::agg_png(path, width = 10, height = 5, units = "in", res = 120)
  } else {
    png(path, width = 10, height = 5, units = "in", res = 120)
  }
  on.exit(dev.off(), add = TRUE)
  layout(matrix(1:2, nrow = 1, ncol = 2))
  par(mar = c(1, 1, 3, 1))
  if (inherits(model, "workflow")) {
    fit_obj <- extract_fit_parsnip(model)
    if (inherits(fit_obj$fit, "rpart")) {
      rpart.plot::rpart.plot(fit_obj$fit, type = 4, extra = 104, main = title, cex = 0.8)
    } else {
      plot(1, type = "n", xlab = "", ylab = "", main = title)
      text(1, 1, "Tree plot: rpart engine only", cex = 0.9)
    }
  } else {
    plot(1, type = "n", xlab = "", ylab = "", main = title)
    text(1, 1, "See boundary panel", cex = 0.9)
  }
  print(plot_prob_boundary(model, data, f1, f2))
  path
}
```
